# Thermochemical Reaction

**Summary**: Chemical reactions that release heat as a byproduct, used here for in-situ heating.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2020-gowida|Gowida, 2020]] applied thermochemical-reaction to provide the required heat for accelerating LTO.

## Key Results and Findings

- The NH4Cl and NaNO2 reaction was found to be highly exothermic with an enthalpy change of -369 kJ/mol. ([[2020-gowida|Gowida, 2020, p. 33]])
